home.title: SparkLabs — Entrepreneurs Growing Entrepreneurs
home.description: SparkLabs is a global AI-First investment firm with 14 entities across six continents. 550+ portfolio companies, a $50M AIM AI Fund, and early positions in OpenAI, Anthropic, and Perplexity — backing the founders of the AI era.

about.title: About
about.description: Since 2013, SparkLabs has connected founders to the world through 14 entities on six continents. Meet our team, our vision, and our global network.

team.title: Team
team.description: Serial entrepreneurs as partners, operators with 15+ years of experience, and a global advisory network — meet the people behind SparkLabs.

entities.title: Global Entities
entities.description: Seoul, Daegu, Taipei, Bangkok, Ho Chi Minh City, Auckland, Dubai, Sydney, Silicon Valley — SparkLabs' global entity network.

advisors.title: Advisors
advisors.description: Industry leaders, serial entrepreneurs, and global executives who advise SparkLabs and its portfolio companies.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: 550+ SparkLabs portfolio companies — from early positions in OpenAI, Anthropic, and Perplexity to leading Korean AI startups.

portfolioAi.title: AI Portfolio
portfolioAi.description: A curated view of SparkLabs' AI portfolio — from global frontier labs to Korea's leading AI-native startups shaping the AI-First era.

programs.title: Programs
programs.description: Batch, Partnership, Spark Claw, Global — four SparkLabs programs designed for founders and organizations.

programsBatch.title: Batch Program
programsBatch.description: 22-week accelerator. KRW 300M investment, a 550+ portfolio network, and a Demo Day finale — SparkLabs' flagship program for early-stage founders in Korea.

programsPartnership.title: Partnership Program
programsPartnership.description: Custom accelerator programs for corporates, governments, universities, and research labs — designed to drive open innovation and cross-border expansion.

programsSparkClaw.title: Spark Claw — AI-First Founder Program
programsSparkClaw.description: When AI becomes your team. A program for solo AI founders with KRW 50M–100M investment, API credits, a global SaaS starter pack, and an intensive bootcamp.

programsGlobal.title: Global Program
programsGlobal.description: APAC, Americas, MENA, ANZ — SparkLabs' global program calendar and open calls across six continents.

newsroom.title: Newsroom
newsroom.description: Press releases, media coverage, perspectives, and announcements from SparkLabs and its portfolio companies — all in one place.

newsroomPress.title: Press Releases
newsroomPress.description: Official press releases issued by SparkLabs and its portfolio companies.

newsroomMedia.title: Media Coverage
newsroomMedia.description: Media coverage and external features of SparkLabs and its portfolio companies across major outlets.

newsroomPerspectives.title: Perspectives
newsroomPerspectives.description: Perspectives on startups, investing, AI, and global expansion — written by SparkLabs partners and portfolio founders.

newsroomAnnouncements.title: Announcements
newsroomAnnouncements.description: Program calls, events, open applications, and other official SparkLabs announcements in one place.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Direct channels for founders, organizations, press, and general inquiries — reach the SparkLabs team.

apply.title: Apply
apply.description: Batch, Spark Claw, Partnership — how to apply to SparkLabs programs, our evaluation criteria, and frequently asked questions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How SparkLabs collects, uses, shares, and retains personal information on its official website.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: The terms of service that apply when using the SparkLabs official website.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.description: The cookies SparkLabs' website uses and how you can control them.

hero.subcopy: A global accelerator network across six continents, discovering and scaling the founders building the AI era.

network.title: Global Network
network.subtitle: Directly operated accelerators and funds across six continents

presence.title: Direct Global Presence
presence.body: SparkLabs owns and operates accelerators and venture funds on six continents, giving founders a runway into each market.

network.title: Global Portfolio Network
network.body: Our portfolio companies connect across borders — sharing markets, tech and customers in one interconnected ecosystem.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem Synergy
ecosystem.body: World-class partners, LPs and advisors accelerate the growth of every SparkLabs company.

founders.title: By Founders, For Founders
founders.body: Partners who have built companies themselves invest, coach and open doors like one of your own.

bornGlobal.title: Born Global, Not Go Global
bornGlobal.body: We back founders who design for the global market from day one, not as an afterthought.

aiFirst.title: AI-First Investment Focus
aiFirst.body: From OpenAI, Anthropic and Perplexity to Korea's AI leaders — we've been betting on the AI revolution early.

sixContinents.title: Six Continents, One Ecosystem
sixContinents.body: Locally run, globally connected — the SparkLabs network moves as one.

ai.title: Strategic Focus: AI
ai.subtitle: $50M AIM AI Fund, backing the leaders of the AI era

coInvestors.title: In great company.
coInvestors.subcopy: SparkLabs invests alongside the world's most trusted global VCs and strategic investors to back every portfolio company through their full growth journey.

testimonials.title: Founders who grew with us.
testimonials.subcopy: Honest reflections from founders who've walked the SparkLabs journey — from first check to global scale.
